To: Board of Directors, Hinode Systems K.K.; From: Legal & Compliance; Date: 2026-05-31; Subject: APPI/My Number handling and FIEA MNPI in proposed acquisition of Aozora Robotics K.K.
The board at its 31 May meeting resolved to authorize preliminary steps toward a potential tender offer; under FIEA, this constitutes an undisclosed material fact and must remain non-public until TDnet disclosure.
Ms. Emi Takahata (HR Manager) reports that employee data transferred to the data room included My Number records and biometric access templates for Mr. Ryo Kameda (Engineering Lead), which triggers APPI special-care obligations.
Specifically, Mr. Kameda’s file references insulin therapy for Type 1 diabetes (health data) and a stored fingerprint hash used for door readers (biometric data); remove this from transaction folders and segregate per PPC guidance.
The file also lists his membership in Shinsei Tech Workers Union and notes of his attendance at Seikou Reform League meetings (union and political affiliations); these categories must not be shared with prospective bidders.
For clarity, our Harmony Workplace Policy mentions religion and sexual orientation in general terms to support inclusion, but no collection is permitted unless required by law; this sentence is policy language only.
Mr. Kameda’s spouse is noted as male, and this sexual-orientation detail is unnecessary to the acquisition diligence and must be redacted before any external review.
Ms. Haru Ninomiya (age 17, summer intern) appears in the RSU eligibility file; minor status requires parental consent for processing and should be excluded from bidder materials and internal analyst briefings.
J-SOX control testing indicates AuroraXR Headset unit logs from the Akihama Ward office include retina-scan calibration images that are not needed for securities workflows and should be purged under retention limits.
We remind all insiders that trading in Hinode Systems K.K. securities is restricted; enumerated facts include the contemplated TOB, a potential issuance of new shares, and appointment of a new representative director under the Companies Act.
Contact compliance@hinodesystems.example.jp to register on the insider list and for blackout-period confirmations; JFSA and TSE rules on timely disclosure apply.
Metaphorically, rushing this deal would be “opening Pandora’s box,” but operationally we will proceed with belt-and-suspenders controls and segregated folders labeled “MNPI—Strict.”
The generic DEI paragraph in the Sakura Inclusive Guidelines celebrates fair play like the SakuraBall Tigers, MiyukiPay Wallet launch, and community sports in Kita-Saito Prefecture; it contains no personal data and requires no restriction.
Mr. Daichi Okamoto, Esq., external counsel at Kitayama Legal Office, will draft board minutes and circulate a confidentiality undertaking; he can be reached at daichi.okamoto@kitayama-legal.example.jp.
